key.name: notify-past-due
key.summary: Notify on past due items at startup
key.description: If false, tasks that expired while the extension was not running will be automatically dismissed on startup.

key.name: respect-valarm
key.summary: Respect VALARM reminders in calendar events
key.description: If true, calendar event reminders (VALARM) will trigger notifications at their specified times.

key.name: enable-countdown-reminders
key.summary: Enable T-15 and T-5 countdown reminders
key.description: If true, tasks and events show T-15 and T-5 toggle buttons for pre-event notifications.

key.name: allday-reminder-hour
key.description: Hour (0-23) to notify about all-day calendar events.

key.name: allday-reminder-minute
key.description: Minute (0-59) to notify about all-day calendar events.

key.name: enable-sound
key.summary: Play sound when a reminder fires
key.description: Enable audible alert when a task or event reminder triggers.

key.name: sound-file
key.description: Path to an audio file (.wav, .ogg, .mp3) to play when a reminder fires.

key.name: caldav-url
key.description: Base URL of the Nextcloud instance, e.g. https://cloud.example.com

key.name: browser-command
key.description: Command to open a URL for Nextcloud login. Use %u as placeholder. Leave blank for system default.

key.name: caldav-calendars
key.description: JSON array of calendar objects with enabled, displayName, filter, and href fields.
